message:
refactor(messaging,net): improve NATS protocol and DNS caching

messaging/nats.rs:
- Fix protocol parsing edge cases
- Improve subscription ID generation
- Better error recovery

net/dns/resolver.rs:
- Add TTL-based cache invalidation
- Improve negative caching for NXDOMAIN
- Better timeout handling for slow nameservers

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
